properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
properties.descricao: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine’s newest strike weapon drifts into Russia on the wind
properties.descricao: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.

properties.titulo_evento: Philippines deploys US-made Triton naval drones in its western waters to scout for intruders
properties.descricao: The transfer comes after the military revealed that China discreetly deployed a 6x6 meter floating platform equipped with an antenna at Scarborough Shoal.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland buys V-BAT drones to boost Baltic Sea naval operations
properties.descricao: The deal puts Poland in line to become the first country on NATO’s eastern flank to acquire the Shield AI-made drone.

properties.titulo_evento: Fishermen capture the moment earthquake hits Venezuelan coast
properties.descricao: Fishermen have captured the moment twin earthquakes hit Venezuela’s La Guaira coastline on Wednesday.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes on Iran test fragile ceasefire
properties.descricao: The US has struck Iran for the first time since the two sides reached a Memorandum of Understanding on June 17.

properties.titulo_evento: Rescue efforts turn to recovery as aftershocks shake Venezuela
properties.descricao: Rescue workers in one Caracas neighbourhood say no help has arrived, two days after twin quakes tore through the city.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump justifies strikes on Iran amid ceasefire
properties.descricao: The US has struck Iran in retaliation for what it says was an Iranian attack on a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: US strikes Iran after attack on vessel in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: Iran's IRGC says it targeted US military in region after Trump administration launched attack on the country.

properties.titulo_evento: Paris Diamond League to go ahead with safety measures amid heatwave
properties.descricao: Only competitions involving professional athletes will be held, with all other activities cancelled.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela shaken by magnitude 4.9 tremor days after major earthquakes
properties.descricao: The country is still reeling from devastating pair of earthquakes that killed hundreds of people earlier this week.

properties.titulo_evento: What is the framework agreement signed by Israel and Lebanon?
properties.descricao: Deal comes after months of US-brokered direct talks, but Israel continues to occupy Lebanese land.

properties.titulo_evento: Desperate families search for missing loved ones in Venezuela
properties.descricao: Families are sharing details about their loved ones online as more than 50,000 people remain missing in Venezuela.

properties.titulo_evento: Burkina Faso cuts diplomatic ties with former colonial ruler France
properties.descricao: The military government, in power since 2022 coup, accused France of having 'neo-colonial ambitions'.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iran in response to drone strike on commercial ship
properties.descricao: The new strikes come in response to an Iranian drone attack on the Ever Lovely in the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
properties.descricao: US Central Command says it has struck missile and drone storage facilities and coastal radar positions.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
properties.descricao: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.

properties.titulo_evento: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
properties.descricao: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 920 people.

properties.titulo_evento: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
properties.descricao: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel and Lebanon sign framework agreement after US-brokered talks
properties.descricao: Hezbollah is not party to Friday's agreement, and previous ceasefires between Israel and Lebanon have still seen near-daily cross-border strikes.

properties.titulo_evento: Christmas market attacker jailed for life for murdering six in Germany
properties.descricao: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
properties.descricao: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels
properties.descricao: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches strikes against Iran following drone attack on cargo ship
properties.descricao: Iranian state media reported that strikes hit a telecommunications mast in the Sirik area of southern Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: IRGC denies direct hotline with US, as Trump warns of ceasefire violations in Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: The spokesperson for the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) denied claims by American officials regarding the establishment of a direct hotline between Iran and the United States concerning the Strait of Hormuz, calling it a "sheer lie".

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela updates earthquake toll: 920 dead, 3,360 injured
properties.descricao: National Assembly president Jorge Rodríguez updated the figure on Friday. The UN reports over 50,000 missing. Spain urges its citizens in Venezuela to contact consular emergency services.

properties.titulo_evento: Marco Rubio announces Israel-Lebanon framework deal, hailing it as first step toward peace
properties.descricao: The officials did not disclose details of the deal, which was signed by Yechiel Leiter and Nada Hamadeh, Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors to the United States.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel declassifies Entebbe raid documents on eve of 50th anniversary
properties.descricao: Secret documents reveal Israeli officials privately weighed negotiations before ordering the daring 1976 Uganda hostage rescue operation.

properties.titulo_evento: 'Help, we are trapped': Venezuela earthquake victims turn to Euronews' TikTok to beg for rescue"
properties.descricao: Lack of resources and patchy telecoms have driven many Venezuelans to despair. In this context, outlets’ social networks, including Euronews, have become key platforms for appeals for help.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Zaporizhzhia ablaze after Russian missile and drone attack leaves at least nine hurt
properties.descricao: Russian missile and drone strikes set an office building ablaze in central Zaporizhzhia on 26 June, injuring at least nine people and triggering a major emergency response.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes: bodies recovered as rescue efforts continue in La Guaira
properties.descricao: Rescue teams worked through the ruins of collapsed buildings in La Guaira on 25 June after twin earthquakes devastated northern Venezuela, killing at least 188 people and injuring around 1,500.

properties.titulo_evento: Gulf states weigh living side by side with Iran as Tehran weaponises Hormuz

properties.titulo_evento: World Cup: Dembélé reacts to scoring first hat-trick for France
properties.descricao: Ousmane Dembélé scored a magnificent hat-trick on Friday, his first with Les Bleus, as France beat Norway 4-1 to finish top of Group I. Here's what the striker said when asked if this was his best ever performance with France

properties.titulo_evento: Cape Verde take World Cup fairytale to knockout stage as Spain end Uruguay's run

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: US military hits Iran over cargo vessel attack
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump has accused Iran of carrying out a drone attack on a cargo vessel on Thursday and violating the US-Iran deal. In response, the US military has launched fresh strikes on Iran. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: How the Iran war impacts Abu Dhabi's AI strategy
properties.descricao: Abu Dhabi's ambitions to turn the UAE into a global hub for digital infrastructure and AI, dubbed "UAE AI Strategy 2031," face pressure after the war with Iran. But the UAE is also known for its business resilience.

properties.titulo_evento: India news: Government sends help to quake-hit Venezuela
properties.descricao: Two air force planes carrying supplies as well as a field hospital unit are on their way. Also making headlines: Qatar has repatriated the bodies of four Indians killed in a gas explosion. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Montenegro arrests Iran-linked hacker wanted by US
properties.descricao: The FBI was helping the Montenegrin police detain an Iranian-Turkish national whose cyberattacks on US infrastructure allegedly caused billions in damages.

properties.titulo_evento: King Charles won't live in Buckingham Palace, reveals taxes
properties.descricao: Buckingham Palace has been the British monarch's official residence in London for nearly two centuries. But royal officials say King Charles and Queen Camilla won't reside there.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran’s World Cup dream is still alive — on day that US launched new military strikes
properties.descricao: American assault on Iranian military installations preceded a critical tournament game that leaves Tehran’s soccer players on the brink of progressing.

properties.descricao: As Brussels bakes, the Berlaymont building's AC stops working.
